data.title: Buy Your Computer Now — Before Tariffs Hit
data.excerpt: If you've been thinking about a new computer, now is the time. Tariffs on electronics are coming and prices will go up.

children.text: If you've been putting off buying a new computer, stop waiting. Here's why: tariffs on imported electronics are coming, and when they hit, prices on laptops, desktops, and components are going to jump significantly.

I've been in this business since 2002. I've seen supply chain disruptions before — COVID chip shortages, natural disasters affecting manufacturing. Every time, the people who bought early came out ahead.
What to Buy Now

If your computer is more than 5 years old, it's time. Both Mac and PC options are excellent right now. For most of my clients in Idyllwild, I recommend a MacBook Air or a mid-range Windows laptop. Both will serve you well for 5-7 years.
Need help choosing? Call me at (951) 468-5674. I'll help you pick the right machine for your needs and budget — no commission, no upsell, just honest advice.

data.title: Why Is Internet So Slow in Idyllwild? What You Can Do About It
data.excerpt: Living in Idyllwild means dealing with slow, unreliable internet. Here's why it happens and practical fixes that actually work.

children.text: If you live in Idyllwild, Pine Cove, or Mountain Center, you already know: the internet up here is painfully slow. Streaming buffers. Video calls freeze. Downloads crawl. Let's talk about why — and what you can actually do about it.
Why Mountain Internet Is Different

Most of Idyllwild relies on DSL or fixed wireless. We don't have fiber optic cables running up the hill. The terrain makes cell towers less effective. And when the weather hits — snow, wind, storms — connections get even worse.
Practical Fixes That Actually Work

1. Upgrade your router. If it's more than 3 years old, a modern Wi-Fi 6 router can make a real difference. 2. Check your placement — routers work best in central locations, not tucked in a closet. 3. Consider a mesh system for larger homes. 4. Look into Starlink — it's now available in our area and offers speeds that blow DSL away.
I help Idyllwild residents optimize their home networks every week. If you're frustrated with your internet, call me at (951) 468-5674. I can usually improve things significantly in a single visit.

data.title: Top Scams Targeting Seniors in Riverside County (2026)
data.excerpt: Scammers are getting more sophisticated. Here are the most common scams targeting seniors in our area and how to protect yourself.

children.text: Every week, I get calls from clients in Idyllwild, Hemet, and San Jacinto who've received suspicious calls, emails, or texts. Scammers are getting smarter, and seniors are their primary targets. Here's what to watch for in 2026.
The 'Tech Support' Scam

A popup appears on your screen saying your computer is infected. It shows a phone number to call. DON'T call it. This is fake. Microsoft, Apple, and Google will never show you a popup asking you to call them. Close the browser window (or restart your computer if you can't close it) and you're fine.
The 'Gift Card' Scam

No legitimate business, government agency, or utility company will EVER ask you to pay with gift cards. If someone asks you to buy gift cards and read them the numbers — it's a scam. Period. The IRS doesn't accept iTunes cards.
If you think you've been targeted by a scam, don't feel embarrassed — these criminals are professionals. Call me at (951) 468-5674 and I'll help you secure your accounts and report the incident.

data.title: How Local Businesses in Idyllwild Can Use ChatGPT (Practical Guide)
data.excerpt: AI isn't just for big tech companies. Here's how small businesses in Idyllwild can use ChatGPT to save time and grow.

children.text: AI tools like ChatGPT aren't just for Silicon Valley. Small businesses right here in Idyllwild can use them to save hours every week. As a certified AI Generalist (AIG-17), I've been helping local businesses integrate these tools practically and safely.
5 Ways to Use ChatGPT in Your Business Today

1. Write customer emails faster — draft responses, follow-ups, and announcements in seconds. 2. Create social media posts — describe what you want and get a week's worth of content. 3. Summarize long documents — paste in a contract or report and get the key points. 4. Generate ideas — brainstorm marketing campaigns, menu items, event themes. 5. Answer customer FAQs — build a knowledge base from your most common questions.
Want to learn how AI can help your specific business? I offer one-on-one coaching sessions. Call (951) 468-5674 or visit my services page to get started.
